description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun with a matte black and dark gray camouflage pattern across its polymer and metal body. The rifle features a short barrel with a small muzzle device, a prominent top-mounted Picatinny rail for optics, and integrated iron sights. The magazine is a detachable box type, slightly translucent and inserted into the pistol grip, which is ergonomically shaped for a secure hold. The stock is minimalistic, blending into the rear of the receiver, and appears to be a fixed or non-extendable design. The overall build is robust, with visible screws and mechanical details, suggesting durability and reliability for urban tactical use. The surface finish is mostly matte with some subtle textural elements for grip and handling.
description: A compact, matte black and gray submachine gun with a short barrel, Picatinny rail, and detachable box magazine. Its robust, modern design features a minimalistic fixed stock and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, muzzle device, and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the camouflage pattern, Picatinny rail, iron sights, and the full length of the magazine and grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the minimalistic stock and the alignment of the upper receiver and sights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the magazine, grip, and mechanical details on the receiver.
